scope: AgenC agents/status.ts ↔ codex codex-rs/core/src/agent/status.rs + protocol/src/protocol.rs::AgentStatus strict parity

requiredBehaviors: union covers exactly: pending_init, running, interrupted, completed, errored, shutdown, not_found
no idle variant (B.3 removed; codex has no idle either)
running carries turnId + startedAtMs (richer than codex's bare Running; doesn't surface to model JSON)
completed carries turnId + endedAtMs + optional lastMessage
errored carries turnId + endedAtMs + error string
interrupted carries turnId + endedAtMs + reason
toAgentStatusJson maps each variant to codex's exact wire shape
bare strings for pending_init|running|interrupted|shutdown|not_found
object form for { completed: string|null } and { errored: string }
no idle arm (post-B.3)
completed/errored/shutdown/not_found are final
pending_init/running/interrupted are non-final (matches codex is_final exactly)
interrupted intentionally non-final so completion watchers loop past an interrupt
turn_started -> running with turnId + startedAtMs
turn_complete -> completed with optional lastMessage + endedAtMs
turn_aborted (Interrupted/BudgetLimited reasons) -> interrupted
turn_aborted (other reasons) -> errored
error event -> errored with payload message
unrelated event types -> undefined (no transition)
tracker initializes at pending_init
subscribe replays current value to new subscribers (BehaviorSubject; matches codex tokio::watch)
terminal state stickiness: final state cannot be overwritten except per documented codex transitions
interrupt-then-running transition allowed (interrupted is non-final)
